headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://unpkg.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://unpkg.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: https://mt1.google.com; connect-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'
